Phoenix's Frame and Crate Masters

Crafting enduring carpentry solutions for Arizona homes and businesses. West Frames and Crates: Quality built to last.

Call Now: +16026174270

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Craftsmanship Rooted in the Desert

West Frames and Crates began over a decade ago with a simple mission: provide honest, reliable carpentry services to our Phoenix neighbors. We saw a need for skilled tradespeople who understood the unique challenges of the Arizona climate and architecture, and we built our business on meeting that need.

Locally Owned

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our carpenter services.

What types of items can you frame?

We can frame virtually anything, including artwork, photographs, documents, memorabilia, and textiles. We have experience working with delicate and valuable items, ensuring they are handled with the utmost care.

How long does it take to get a custom frame?

The timeframe depends on the complexity of the project and the materials selected. We'll provide you with an estimated completion date during the consultation process. We always strive to complete projects as quickly as possible without compromising quality.

Do you offer delivery and installation services?

Yes, we offer delivery and installation services for your convenience. Our team will carefully transport and install your framed piece, ensuring it is securely mounted and looks its best.

Reviews From Our Carpenter Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"West Frames and Crates did an amazing job framing my family photos. They helped me choose the perfect frames to match my decor, and the quality of the work is outstanding. I highly recommend them!"

Maria G. Custom Framing

"Our deck was in rough shape after years of Arizona sun. West Frames and Crates repaired the damaged boards and railings, making it look like new again. They were professional and efficient."

David S. Deck Repair

"Needed a custom crate built to ship some fragile equipment. West Frames and Crates delivered a sturdy, well-built crate that protected my equipment during transport. Excellent service!"

Lisa K. Custom Crates
